name: icloud-mail-manager
description: Manage Apple iCloud Mail through MCP using IMAP and SMTP.

tools.name: list_folders
tools.description: List all mail folders and recursive tree structure.

tools.name: manage_folder
tools.description: Create, rename, or delete a folder or subfolder.

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Search emails by sender, subject, date range, and keyword.

tools.name: read_email
tools.description: Read full email content (plain text and HTML) by UID.

tools.name: manage_attachments
tools.description: List or save attachments for a specific email UID.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send an email with rich text and optional attachments.

tools.name: organize_email
tools.description: Move an email or mark as read/unread.

tools.name: suggest_organization
tools.description: Suggest folder organization based on account mode and frequent senders.
